name: detaches_agent OpenClaw Adapter
description: Agent-side protocol assets for OpenClaw agents connected through detaches_agent.

local-user-machine.execution: detaches_agent writes approved requests into the user's local session terminal

remote-agent-host.execution: requires Gateway adapter or OpenClaw agent-side execution adapter

main-agent-machine.execution: detaches_agent broker runs an approved structured rsync/scp transfer from staged file to Host/Main Agent SSH destination

cliCommands.inspect-context: Summarize session identity, adapter readiness, capability targets, and routing warnings without executing tools.
cliCommands.doctor: Turn a detaches context file or one-time context export URL into an agent-side runbook: current identity, requestable targets, blocked targets, safety rules, and exact broker-event command templates.
cliCommands.context-fetch: Fetch a one-time detaches_agent context export URL, validate it, and write clientContext or detaches JSON for subsequent adapter commands.
cliCommands.broker-probe: Verify a detaches_agent Tool Broker capabilities endpoint before submitting requests.
cliCommands.terminal-run: Primary gateway-terminal runtime command. Bootstrap/refresh a lease from --host, submit a command, wait for Detach Agent approval and execution, then return status/output/exitCode.
cliCommands.terminal-stream: Stream an Agent Terminal Runtime run by runId.
cliCommands.terminal-cancel: Cancel an Agent Terminal Runtime run by runId.
cliCommands.terminal-session: Bootstrap or inspect the cached Agent Terminal Runtime session for --host.
cliCommands.terminal-request: Emit a detaches-terminal fenced request block, emit a Tool Broker gateway-event envelope, or submit it to detaches_agent. Supports --context to read session and broker fields; use --submit to post with the context endpoint.
cliCommands.file-transfer-request: Emit a detaches-file-transfer fenced request block, emit a Tool Broker gateway-event envelope, or submit it to detaches_agent. Supports --context to read session and broker fields; use --submit to post with the context endpoint.
cliCommands.main-agent-save-file-request: Emit a main-agent-save-file fenced request block, emit a Tool Broker gateway-event envelope, or submit it to detaches_agent. Host/Main Agent chooses destination path; detaches_agent broker runs a structured rsync/scp transfer after user approval.
cliCommands.credential-request: Submit a credential.request interaction to detaches_agent and optionally wait up to 300000ms for a user-visible password/secret popup result.

hardRules: Never claim a command, file read, file transfer, download, archive, or modification has happened until approved tool output proves it.
Never change a target from remote-agent-host, gateway-managed, or main-agent-machine to local-user-machine as a fallback.
Use terminal-run --host for ordinary local-user-machine terminal commands; fenced blocks and broker-event requests are compatibility fallbacks.
Never use interactionEventEndpoint for terminal commands.
Every compatibility tool request must include target and reason.
Files attached by detaches_agent start in the user's local staging area and are not available on the remote agent host or Host/Main Agent machine until an approved transfer succeeds.
